title: artanthe alnoides
intro: Artanthe alnoides, also known as the Indian mastich or Ceylon mastich, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka and the surrounding regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Artanthe alnoides include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Artanthe alnoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of traditional medicines and cosmetics.
